title: Iron-catalyzed oxidative stress reveals an exposome-related ferroptosis-resistant karyomegalic niche in BRCA1-linked renal carcinogenesis.
snippet: Early cancer initiation under chronic oxidative stress requires the survival of epithelial cells that should otherwise be eliminated by regulated cell death. However, the spatial and morphological identity of such stress-adapted cells remains poorly defined. Here, we integrated Xenium single-cell spatial transcriptomics, quantitative nuclear morphometrics,....
